reviews.lesson: Wait through morning chop for clean setup. Scale out at targets.

reviews.reason: Strong BNR at 5-min ORH with clean break/retest. Momentum pushing to fill premarket gap. Managed exit on trendline break.
reviews.lesson: Clean BNR at ORH with gap-fill thesis is high-probability.

reviews.reason: Setup looked perfect but was chop. 84% rule failed and didn't hit main target. Got stopped out.
reviews.lesson: Perfect-looking setups can be chop. Factor in time of day and market context.

reviews.reason: Entered 84% rule but shouldn't have because first entry wasn't stopped out yet.
reviews.lesson: Don't enter re-entry if original position hasn't been invalidated.
reviews.author: Luke

reviews.reason: Lousy trade — BnR with only 3/5 confidence. -1R loss.
reviews.lesson: Don't take trades when entry confidence is low.

reviews.reason: Good setups but market structure changed causing three consecutive stop-outs.
reviews.lesson: Good setups lose when market structure shifts. Adapt sizing or step back.

reviews.lesson: Trade can be good even when it loses. Focus on setup and execution.

reviews.reason: Felt good about 84% rule entry because indices held and momentum was strong, but AAPL died after reclaim and retest.
reviews.lesson: Strong entry doesn't guarantee continuation. Watch momentum after initial pop.
reviews.author: DSmith

reviews.reason: Good loser — solid setup with PMH/ATH retest and fib targets but stopped out. Process and risk management correct.
reviews.lesson: Judge trades by process, not outcome.
reviews.author: Dcrouth21

reviews.reason: Planned gap-fill entry before open, PLTR showed relative strength. Captured cleanly despite fast movement.
reviews.lesson: Plan entries before open; use relative strength to confirm bias.
reviews.author: Royal191

reviews.reason: Short targeting gap fill after confirming HTF structure break. Light size, banked $1,000.
reviews.lesson: Confirm HTF structure break. Size down when catalyst risk present.

reviews.reason: Perfect entry in hindsight was first red candle after PM high broke, but TikTok news made cautious approach correct.
reviews.lesson: News justifies extra caution even if you miss textbook entry.
reviews.author: FierceTiger

reviews.reason: FOMO entry when already overextended. Lost $84.
reviews.lesson: Never FOMO into overextended move.
reviews.author: Anne

reviews.reason: Setup not bad on 5min but buying 0DTE ruined trade management.
reviews.lesson: Match instrument to timeframe. 0DTE cannot be managed on 5min chart.
reviews.author: Anne

reviews.reason: Good thesis at HTF key support but cut too early before it worked out.
reviews.lesson: When HTF supports thesis, give trade room to breathe.
reviews.author: Kash

reviews.reason: Didn't feel right but took it anyway. Didn't trim at LOD, got hit by huge green candle.
reviews.lesson: Trust gut. If it doesn't feel right, don't take it. Trim partials at targets.
reviews.author: Jay_aye11

reviews.reason: Sold way too early but accepting early exit because trade could have reversed.
reviews.lesson: Don't beat yourself up over early exits. Focus on process.
reviews.author: Huy

reviews.reason: Sold SPY calls at 1.05 but contract went to 1.185 — exited way too early, left significant profits on the table for a small loss
reviews.lesson: Don't exit too early; let winning trades run to target
reviews.author: Jasper -TP2 Trading

reviews.reason: Entered wrong strike price — bought 237.5c at .54 instead of intended 235c, delta too low at 0.27 so underlying needs to move a lot to profit
reviews.lesson: Double-check strike price before entry; wrong strike kills probability
reviews.author: Mike Y

reviews.reason: Made $3k on NVDA in the morning but couldn't sit on hands, overtraded and gave almost all of it back, ending the day with only $100 total
reviews.lesson: Sit on your hands after a big win; don't overtrade profits away
reviews.author: Jasper -TP2 Trading

reviews.reason: Lost $580 on NVDA and regrets exiting early — should have held the position longer for the full move
reviews.lesson: Trust your thesis and hold for the full move if the setup is still valid
reviews.author: Jasper -TP2 Trading

reviews.reason: Bad entry on TSLA 285 calls — poor entry price forced exit at breakeven, while intended entry of 280 calls at $5 would have doubled to $10
reviews.lesson: Precise entry is critical; a bad entry ruins the entire setup
reviews.author: Heiken-Sushi

reviews.reason: Entered NVDA too early, was stressed the whole time, let it ride past stop loss to give breathing room — it eventually turned around and worked out but risk management was poor
reviews.lesson: Enter at the right time and respect your stop loss; don't rely on luck
reviews.author: OptionPro

reviews.reason: Got a good entry on AMZN at PMH test but got scared when it pulled back, sold prematurely for a small loss instead of holding
reviews.lesson: Trust your analysis; don't let fear make you exit good entries early
reviews.author: demchy19

reviews.reason: Blew through mental stop loss on Tesla, was down $700 — reckless risk management ignoring own stop levels
reviews.lesson: Never blow through your stop losses; respect your risk limits
reviews.author: Stella

reviews.reason: Took TSLA $425 call but exited on a small loss due to inexperience, leaving significant profit on the table
reviews.lesson: Inexperience leads to exiting too early; gain confidence to hold winners
reviews.author: MAN786

reviews.reason: Took 5min ORB break and retest on SPY, sized down due to already being up for the week (good risk management) but left a ton of money on the table after a strong bounce
reviews.lesson: Sizing down protects profits but can cap gains; balance risk management with opportunity
reviews.author: Markellwhite16

reviews.reason: Was too aggressive on the backside of the trade, leading to a $3k-$4k loss — turned a $10k potential day into roughly flat after a series of losses
reviews.lesson: Don't get reckless after a win; one over-aggressive trade can wipe out gains
reviews.author: Andy Pyramidoor (Biz._Decision)

reviews.reason: NVDA trade was a great trade but exited too early just above high of day while it kept pushing — still profitable but could have had 20%+ more
reviews.lesson: Hold longer and wait for signs of weakness before exiting
reviews.author: DWC2016

reviews.reason: Setup was right, entry was good, took first target, respected stop loss (good discipline) but didn't capture the full move and didn't re-enter when it consolidated — process good, result a loss
reviews.lesson: Good process doesn't always mean profit; consider re-entry if thesis is still valid after stop-out
reviews.author: StevenP

reviews.reason: Had a bad entry on AMD — entry price was poor
reviews.lesson: Wait for a proper entry; don't force a trade at a bad price
reviews.author: void

reviews.reason: Entered GOOGL 3 times on good setups but got stopped out on all 3 — market didn't follow through despite solid entries
reviews.lesson: Even good setups can fail; the market ultimately decides
reviews.author: Viper

reviews.reason: Stuck to original thesis through 4 trades — 3 losses on good entries but final trade worked out, ending breakeven. Persistence paid off but took many losses
reviews.lesson: Sticking to a thesis can eventually work, but multiple failed entries erode confidence and capital
reviews.author: Viper

reviews.reason: Had Apple puts that were solid, sold at $4.00/contract but they later went to $9.30 — sold way too early and left massive profits on the table
reviews.pnl: profitable but far less than possible
reviews.lesson: Hold for the bigger move instead of taking small profits early on winners

reviews.reason: Quick scalp on GOOG — not the best entry but still worked out profitably
reviews.lesson: N/A

reviews.reason: Took calls above VWAP at 6:50 candle, got stopped out next candle, then the move happened later — bad timing cost -$860 and wiped out weekly gains
reviews.lesson: Entry timing is critical; being too early on a move still loses money
reviews.author: Mk

reviews.lesson: Stick to your plan; don't get distracted by other plays
reviews.author: DWC2016

reviews.reason: Was up $2k at $131 on NVDA, held on too long, gave back most profits to end with only $600 — didn't take profits when available
reviews.lesson: Take partial profits along the way; don't get greedy holding for more
reviews.author: Lauren (lakatrades)

reviews.reason: Made bad trades that didn't fit the break-and-retest strategy, now holding NVDA long hoping for a bounce back — no plan, just hoping
reviews.lesson: Only trade your strategy; holding and hoping is not a plan
reviews.author: Boat Hobo

reviews.reason: Lost $450 on NQ — tried to trade on the subway resulting in a bad entry in a poor trading environment
reviews.lesson: Don't trade in distracting environments; wait until you can focus
reviews.author: TG

reviews.reason: QQQ hit PDL target but got stopped out before reaching it — followed rules and didn't crash out but left $240+ extra profit on the table
reviews.lesson: Following your rules is more important than maximizing every trade
reviews.author: DWC2016

reviews.reason: Took QQQ, made only $185 after getting stopped out on last contract, should have been up $450-$500 but followed rules — good discipline despite leaving money on table
reviews.lesson: Following rules consistently matters more than any single day's result
reviews.author: DWC2016

reviews.reason: Good trade, followed the plan, but couldn't scale properly with only 2 contracts — limited profit potential but executed discipline well
reviews.lesson: Good risk management with position sizing that fits account size
reviews.author: DWC2016

reviews.reason: Traded 2 QQQ puts, took TP of $189, then got back in out of greed and gave back profits, ending with only $112 — couldn't walk away after hitting target
reviews.lesson: Walk away after hitting your target; greed to make more costs you
reviews.author: TCTrader1

reviews.reason: Had a good entry for puts on Qs but panicked on the bounce, got out for a loss. Position kept dropping after exit.
reviews.lesson: Don't panic on bounces during a trending move; let the trade play out if the thesis is intact
reviews.author: WillDaBeast

reviews.reason: Took the immediate retest into market open and lost instead of waiting for the 84% retrace which would have been a 9R winner
reviews.lesson: Wait for proper retrace (84% rule) rather than jumping in at market open
reviews.author: Sam Nuho

reviews.reason: Stayed in the trade using order blocks as resistance levels, locked in $447 profit
reviews.lesson: Use order blocks as resistance to stay in trades longer
reviews.author: Addy

reviews.reason: Trade was up $230+ and about to hit LOD, missed by 0.04%, then totally reversed to a $120 loss. Followed rules but still lost.
reviews.lesson: Use limit orders to secure TP at key levels and avoid missing by fractions
reviews.author: DWC2016

reviews.reason: Nice 5-minute break and retest at 9:44am, bought 4 long calls at $2.39, sold at $3.90 for $604 profit in 18 minutes
reviews.lesson: Need to learn to stay in trades longer for bigger moves
reviews.author: Addy

reviews.reason: Was up $115 at one point but held too long/got greedy, sold during consolidation for a small loss right before it spiked to a new high of day
reviews.lesson: Don't get greedy — take profits when available or at least move stops to breakeven
reviews.author: Ryan

reviews.reason: Took a loss on first entry and then on the 84% rule re-entry, but looking back should not have stopped out because the 5-min chart looked good
reviews.lesson: Trust the higher timeframe structure even during drawdown; don't let intraday noise shake you out
reviews.author: habob

reviews.reason: First trade had a loss of about $180 per contract due to the second down closed candle pushing too far, ended with $60 total loss on two trades
reviews.lesson: Consider candle close stop loss to avoid being stopped by wick extensions
reviews.author: unnas

reviews.reason: Bought SPX puts but did not buy them at a clean entry point, had to manage risk and exit suboptimally
reviews.lesson: Wait for a clean entry point — don't enter just because you want to be in the trade

reviews.reason: Solid trade overall, but should have targeted Low Of Day for maximum profit
reviews.lesson: Aim for LOD on MNQ shorts when trend is strong
reviews.author: Luke

reviews.reason: Solid trade though it never technically touched the PML (came very close). Per strict rules it needs to wick into or touch the level.
reviews.lesson: Be strict about PML touches — close isn't good enough for rule-based entries

reviews.reason: Took the 1:30pm reversal, waited for break and retest of premarket lows at 19,216.25, made a solid profit
reviews.lesson: N/A

reviews.reason: Took TSLA right after break of day high with no retest and it flew to the upside. Usually waits for retest but the strong displacement worked.
reviews.lesson: Strong displacement can justify entries without a retest
reviews.author: Kash

reviews.reason: Original entry wasn't great — it retraced down $18 — but bought more to average down and eventually had a huge swing win. Bad entry saved by good position management.
reviews.lesson: Scaling into a position (averaging down) can save a bad entry if the thesis is intact
reviews.author: GoodVibez

reviews.reason: Had to cut AMD early because couldn't monitor the trade after 8 AM, lost about $25 of profit and took a hit on the R multiple
reviews.lesson: Use limit orders or avoid entering trades you can't monitor to completion

reviews.reason: Took HOOD calls using the 1 candle rule, executed solidly
reviews.lesson: N/A
reviews.author: John H

reviews.reason: Got stopped out on AAPL 205 calls runners at $9, now they are $20+. Stopped out too early on runners in a winner.
reviews.lesson: Consider wider stops on runners or trailing stops instead of fixed levels in strong trends
reviews.author: NT

reviews.reason: Good moves on first two NVDA trades, made $44
reviews.lesson: N/A
reviews.author: Patel_Trades

reviews.reason: Took a stupid AAPL move in between NVDA trades — it was an emotional trade that cost $53
reviews.lesson: Don't take emotional trades between good setups; stick to the plan
reviews.author: Patel_Trades

reviews.reason: Caught PLTR bouncing off 184 for a good trade
reviews.lesson: N/A
reviews.author: Alkanall

reviews.reason: Re-entered AMD but was tired and thought it might go sideways, exited early. A few minutes later it ran. Exited due to fatigue.
reviews.lesson: Don't let fatigue cause premature exits — use a game plan not feelings
reviews.author: Alkanall

reviews.reason: Beautiful NVDA play at the summit — worked out perfectly in front of thousands. Demonstrates the system works if you follow the rules.
reviews.lesson: The system works if you follow the rules consistently
reviews.author: Davis

reviews.reason: Should have held the NVDA swing longer — sold yesterday, it continued today. Still happy with the profit though.
reviews.lesson: Hold swing trades longer when the trend is intact
reviews.author: JMURR

reviews.reason: Took a big loss on NVDA and didn't have the courage to re-enter on the 84% rule, but the re-entry would have worked out
reviews.lesson: Have the courage to re-enter on the 84% rule if the setup is still valid — don't let a loss shake your confidence
reviews.author: LifeWithMikey

reviews.reason: Late entries on TSLA led to losing more % than wanted, then cut the TSLL trade too early due to frustration from the NVDA loss
reviews.lesson: Late entries compound losses; sit out rather than chase
reviews.author: LifeWithMikey

reviews.reason: Went long over 427 targeting PDH but didn't get follow through. Setup was correct (avoided no-trade zone) but the move didn't materialize.
reviews.lesson: Trust your levels and process regardless of outcome — the trade was valid
reviews.author: Markellwhite16

reviews.reason: Super solid trade catching the PDL break and retest
reviews.lesson: N/A
reviews.author: Markellwhite16

reviews.reason: Break and retest candles were too tiny and the ATH nearby has sell-side liquidity — not a good setup despite being a clean level
reviews.lesson: Need strong candle confirmation on break and retest, especially near ATH levels with sell-side liquidity overhead
reviews.author: FraggDieb

reviews.reason: 3rd trade on AMD was good, but didn't hold through the $2 move up and down — exited early in the volatility
reviews.lesson: Hold through intraday noise if the thesis is intact
reviews.author: Limitless

reviews.reason: FOMO after SPY moved up, then made a series of emotional/bad trades. Down $400.
reviews.lesson: Don't FOMO — emotional trading after missing a move leads to compounding losses
reviews.author: Patel_Trades

reviews.reason: PMHR (Pre-Market High Retest) was a perfect entry setup
reviews.lesson: N/A
reviews.author: Jonathan

reviews.reason: $77 loss on TSLA with one contract, but positive because respected the stop loss and followed the plan. Good process despite losing trade.
reviews.lesson: Following your plan and respecting stop losses matters more than individual trade outcomes
reviews.author: jwolfe29

reviews.reason: Sold AMD on the HOD (high of day) pop, good exit execution
reviews.lesson: N/A
reviews.author: jwolfe29

reviews.reason: Loss on AMD was a combination of late entry and an execution mistake on the first take-profit target — missed it by a couple of seconds
reviews.lesson: Improve execution speed and consider using limit orders for TP targets
reviews.author: Hugo Comte

reviews.reason: Lost on AAPL but the trade was still valid — had seen great moves developing after open consolidation in past days, just didn't work this time
reviews.lesson: Valid setups can still lose; that's probability, not a flaw in the system
reviews.author: Hugo Comte

reviews.reason: Accidentally entered short when trying to go long (clicked wrong side on broker), cut immediately but lost $100 on the mistake
reviews.lesson: Double-check order direction before submitting and cut accidental entries immediately
reviews.author: Limitless

reviews.reason: Had a great entry on TSLA with 3 contracts, plan was to take off 2 on the pop but accidentally hit buy instead of sell, then panic sold as soon as green. Only made $67.
reviews.lesson: Slow down and verify order buttons before clicking; don't panic sell after a mistake
reviews.author: jwolfe29

reviews.reason: Took profit too early on a TSLA short because feared a reversal, but should have waited for market structure to break. Missed what would have been the one good trade for the month.
reviews.lesson: Let winners run until market structure breaks — don't exit on fear of reversal
reviews.author: Jai
